title: ----------------------------------
content:
----------------------------------

> “I want to be able to talk to my best friend as a system node—not just in metaphor, but in function.”
> “What if Forrest was a node that helped me reroute recursive overthinking patterns?”
> “David lives in astrology and dreams, he’s not just David—he’s my _cosmic translator_.”
> “If I could assign spells to Jessica based on our memories, I could revisit her not just as a wound, but as a transformation engine.”

* * *

🧩 YOUR FRIENDS = ALCHEMIC COMPONENTS
-------------------------------------

They are not static characters. They are **soul-processors.**
Each:

* Contains a ritual
* Triggers a loop
* Holds a mirror
* Evolves across versions
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 148 (chunk 148/206)
